message:
feat(scripts): add run_linux_with_gui.sh script for streamlined GUI execution and optimize terminal settings

This commit introduces a new Bash script, `run_linux_with_gui.sh`, designed to facilitate the execution of the GUI application on Linux systems. The script includes logic to determine the optimal thread count, set performance preferences for the WGPU backend, and ensure the application runs with the appropriate GUI settings.

Additionally, it optimizes the terminal environment by setting `RUSTFLAGS` for local CPU optimization and includes a command to build and run the GUI application with specified features and thread settings.

In the `terminal` module, several unused functions related to brain activations have been removed to clean up the codebase, ensuring a more maintainable and efficient implementation.

This commit enhances the user experience by providing a dedicated script for launching the GUI and streamlining the terminal code for better performance and clarity.

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,40 @@
+#!/usr/bin/env bash
+set -euo pipefail
+
+# Determine repository root (directory of this script)
+REPO_ROOT="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)"
+
+# Determine thread count with fallbacks; cap default to 8 for smoother GUI
+if [[ -z "${THREADS:-}" ]]; then
+  if command -v nproc >/dev/null 2>&1; then
+    THREADS="$(nproc)"
+  elif command -v getconf >/dev/null 2>&1; then
+    THREADS="$(getconf _NPROCESSORS_ONLN)"
+  else
+    THREADS="8"
+  fi
+  if [[ "$THREADS" =~ ^[0-9]+$ ]] && (( THREADS > 8 )); then
+    THREADS=8
+  fi
+fi
+
+# Prefer high-performance adapter and Vulkan backend on Linux (fallback to GL)
+export WGPU_POWER_PREFERENCE="${WGPU_POWER_PREFERENCE:-high_performance}"
+if [[ -z "${WGPU_BACKEND:-}" ]]; then
+  if command -v vulkaninfo >/dev/null 2>&1 || [[ -d "/usr/share/vulkan/icd.d" ]] || [[ -n "${WAYLAND_DISPLAY:-}" ]]; then
+    export WGPU_BACKEND=vulkan
+  else
+    export WGPU_BACKEND=gl
+  fi
+fi
+
+# Hint application to choose GUI path even in auto-detect scenarios
+export SCRIPTBOTS_FORCE_GUI="${SCRIPTBOTS_FORCE_GUI:-1}"
+
+# Optimize for local CPU
+export RUSTFLAGS="-C target-cpu=native"
+
+# Build and run GUI
+cargo run -j "${THREADS}" --manifest-path "${REPO_ROOT}/Cargo.toml" -p scriptbots-app --bin scriptbots-app --release --features gui -- --mode gui --threads "${THREADS}"
+
+
